---
agent: agent
---

There is a wiki under ./docs/wiki/ that is used to keep track of the usage docs when using lanscape as a library or websocket server. If the #changes are made affect the schemas/models or add/remove new features, they need to be documented.

Before making changes, ensure you understand how the wiki is formatted, and understand the github workflow: .github\workflows\wiki-sync.yml

Include clear examples of how to use the features and any relevant code snippets. This is important for users who want to use the library or websocket server in their own projects, and it also helps to keep track of the changes and updates made to the project over time.

Once finished with the changes, re-read the files that you touched and verify them for relevancy/accuracy. If you see areas that you consider potentially problematic & you arent sure, ask the user.
